**1. Introduction and Regulatory Status** This website and the information contained herein are provided by GenInnov Pte. Ltd. ("GenInnov", "we", "us"). GenInnov Pte. Ltd. is a fund management company holding a Capital Markets Services (CMS) license, and is regulated by the Monetary Authority of Singapore ("MAS") under the Securities and Futures Act, Singapore ("SFA"). GenInnov manages various funds, including a Cayman-registered master-feeder fund structure.
**2. Intended Audience and Jurisdictional Restrictions** This website is intended solely for persons who are "accredited investors" or "institutional investors" as defined under the SFA, and other professional or qualified persons as permitted under the applicable laws of their jurisdiction.

results.title: About | GenInnov
excerpts:
About Process Fund Media GenInnov Thoughts Contact Us
GenInnov Thoughts
**A New Breed of Innovation Funds**
GenInnov challenges conventional investment norms. We are not limited by sector, geography, or traditional thinking
AN OPEN LETTER FROM OUR FOUNDER
A Global Fund for the World’s Most Transformative Innovation
GenInnov invests in structural breakthroughs reshaping industries and nations from semiconductors and robotics to biotechnology and embedded intelligence.
Our edge lies in identifying innovation early, not only where it’s most visible, but where it’s most impactful across geographies, technologies, and sectors. With a research-first, principles-led approach, we back ideas that scale, endure, and define the future.
We frame our investments around long-term megatrends  from agentic AI to physical intelligence  and the rise of a Fourth Macro Sector, where intelligence becomes a design primitive in every object.
Nilesh Jasani
CEO & Portfolio Manager
GenInnov Global Innovation Fund
BACKED & TRUSTED BY
Investing in GI from AI.
FUND DETAILS
The Advisory Board
Tan Chin Hwee
[](https://www.linkedin.com/in/chin-hwee-tan-365ab15/)
Mr. Tan Chin Hwee has extensive experience in finance and in leadership at global firms. Mr. Tan was the first Asian who held the position of Chief Executive Officer, Asia-Pacific of Trafigura Group Pte. Ltd (“Trafigura”), one of the world's largest commodity traders (12th largest company in Global Fortune 500 in 2023). Before joining Trafigura, he was a founding partner in Asia for Apollo Global Management (“Apollo”), a leading global alternative investment firm. Prior to Apollo, he was a Managing Director at Amaranth, where he pioneered a number of historic capital market “firsts” in public and private investment opportunities.

results.title: GenInnov Global Innovation Fund | LinkedIn
excerpts:
Section Title: GenInnov Global Innovation Fund > About us
Content:
GenInnov Global Innovation Fund captures GenAI-era shifts through a concentrated, long-only portfolio. Targeting disruptive sectors like Robotics and Biotech, we enforce strict financial discipline—prioritizing profitability and valuation—to offer a stable pathway to next-generation growth. Geninnov Global Innovation Fund operates under Geninnov Pte Ltd, a fund management company licensed under the Monetary Authority of Singapore.
